'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 5''' was the 5th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[December]] [[1996]] and [[January]] [[1997]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Star News|New Hopes]]
*Q&A
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Caroline Blakiston]]
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*[[Hasbro]] Competition

===Features===
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']]
*:<small>Your complete guide to Shadows of the Empire – details of the forthcoming [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|Nintendo 64 game]], a run-down of the story and characters plus an interview with author [[Steve Perry]].</small>
*"[[Predators of the Empire]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 6|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 6]]}}
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]''
*:<small>Part Two of Two. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] versus Boba Fett? Surely some mistake – for the impersonator, that is…</small>
